channel.title: tor on Have an average day :|
channel.description: Recent content in tor on Have an average day :|

item.title: Sadly it seems that someone was abusing my tor exit node (IRC & SSH) aka #ThisIsWhyWeCantHaveNiceThings
item.description: Sadly it seems that someone was abusing my tor exit node (IRC & SSH) aka # ThisIsWhyWeCantHaveNiceThings

item.title: It's official, I'm running a stable tor node.
item.description: Got this email today. I’m pretty happy about it. Hello and welcome to Tor! We’ve noticed that your Tor node THEHIJAX has been running long enough to be flagged as “stable”. First, we would like to thank you for your contribution to the Tor network! As Tor grows, we require ever more nodes to improve browsing speed and reliability for our users. Your node is helping to serve the millions of Tor clients out there.

item.title: Looks like Yelp is blocking me ...
item.description: Looks like Yelp is blocking me because I’m running a tor exit/relay node?
